name: GrowthWare v1.00
description:
After hours of doomscrolling social media, you accidentally click on a link that you obviously shouldn't have. Thankfully, nothing crazy happened. Right?

Images generated using PixAI.art
Tested using proxy (z-ai/glm-5)

Here's how it work:

When you open the app, you will be greeted with a very simple interface. In the very center is a "create new profile" button. At the bottom are three buttons. One for settings, one for the home page, and a "force stop" button.

When you create a new profile, you must first name the profile. Once you have given it a name, you will be given two options:

(1) Create From Scratch
This will let you create a person from scratch. It's basically an NPC creator. You can write a prompt that describes them (e.g. "A tall, anthropomorphic panther with long straight hair. She has large G cup breasts and a narrow waist. She works as a barista at the Café down the street."

Another option is prompting a character from a piece of media (OOC: This will depend on how smart your LLM is. The default Janitor LLM may not know very niche characters.) This looks like: "Superman from the DC Universe" or "Krystal from Star Fox".

When you click submit for either one of them, you will be given a 3D model of the character, and a description of their personality. If you wish to change certain parts of their body, you highlight the area you wish to change, and a text box will appear. Then, simply write the description you'd like to see.

(Example: "Pulchra Fellini from Zenless Zone Zero" — Highlight her thighs and type in: "Give her a 60 inch butt." — Editing the personality descriptor: "make her my loving, soft girlfriend.")

Once everything is said and done, you can click: "ACCEPT". After a moment or two of waiting is done, that character will appear in your life. The way that they appear is kind of random, but they will never suddenly spawn in front of you. The character might knock on your door, or you run into them at work, or you might could up besides them in bed.

(2) Photo Reference

This is nearly identical, but doesn't act as an NPC creator. Instead, you can take a photo and/or submit a photo of an already existing person. If the character does not yet exist, it will not appear. If the person/character already does exist, it will be accepted.

From here, it's almost identical to the other option. The same body modifier options will appear. Highlight a section, type in what change you want to make, and hit accept. You can also adjust their personality and other information about them that you want.

When changes made to characters are accepted, they will happen in real time. If you give a girl huge breasts, they will rapidly grow right then and there. If you make your own dick big, it will grow in front of your very own eyes.

EXTRA IMAGES:

Thank you all so much for the support on other bots! It seriously means a lot to me <3. Since it seems like my scenario bots are more popular, I have another one for y'all!

I don't really have a lot to say. It's just another scenario RPG / Sandbox bot, with even fewer limits, since that's what y'all seem to like. Enjoy!
creator: KoolaidWasTaken
